name: Angel Biscuits (No Rising Necessary)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the cake yeast in the lukewarm water.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together the plain flour, baking powder, salt, and soda.
3. Cut in the shortening using your fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add the buttermilk to the dry ingredients and stir until all the flour is dampened.
5. Turn off heat (no need for an oven).
6. Transfer the dough onto a floured surface and knead gently for about one minute.
7. Roll the dough to your desired thickness.
8. Cut out biscuits using a biscuit cutter.
9. Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Allow the biscuits to cool before serving. They can be stored in an airtight container and used within a week.
